page.content: The first table presents absorbance measurements at 700 nm with concentrations in mg/mL for plant extract and BHT. For a concentration of 0.2 mg/mL, the absorbance for plant extract is 0.100 ± 0.00 and for BHT it is 0.110 ± 0.10. At 0.4 mg/mL, the plant extract shows an absorbance of 0.330 ± 0.00, while BHT displays 0.510 ± 0.00. For 0.6 mg/mL, the values are 0.471 ± 0.00 for plant extract and 0.790 ± 0.00 for BHT. Lastly, at 0.8 mg/mL, the absorbance readings are 0.560 ± 0.00 for plant extract and 1.050 ± 0.00 for BHT. The second table categorizes four types of clones, detailing the total of selected clones, average size of overlap Insert/CDS, and average size of non-overlap Insert/CDS. Type I has a total of 2055 clones with an average overlap size of 635 and a non-overlap size of 835.

page.content: Type II comprises 463 clones, with an average overlap size of 1121 and no non-overlap size recorded. Type III consists of 827 clones with an overlap size of 822 and a non-overlap size of 418. Type IV includes 1124 clones, with an overlap size of 726 and a non-overlap size of 481. The total across all types is 4421 clones, averaging 830.5a for overlap and 578b for non-overlap.
